tasks.instruction: Przeczytaj tekst. Uzupelnij kazda luke (1.1-1.8) jednym wyrazem, przeksztalcajac wyrazy podane w ramce tak, aby otrzymac logiczny i gramatycznie poprawny tekst. Dwa wyrazy zostaly podane dodatkowo i nie pasuja do zadnej luki.
tasks.title: JOURNEY TO THE STARS
tasks.text: Space is full of 1.1. ________ surprises. Every year, 1.2. ________ make new findings about distant planets and galaxies. The 1.3. ________ of Mars has been a dream for many people. In the past, travelling to space seemed 1.4. ________, but today astronauts regularly visit the International Space Station. One of the most important 1.5. ________ in space history was finding water on the Moon. Astronauts experience 1.6. ________ in space, which means they float freely inside the spacecraft. The 1.7. ________ launch of the James Webb Telescope allowed us to see into the 1.8. ________ of the universe further than ever before. Scientists hope to find new forms of life beyond Earth one day.
